feed.description: Photography conversations: craft, storytelling, workflow, and making images under real constraints.
feed.title: Frame & Light

bullets:
# Frame & Light — Episode
## Underwater Images That Feel Alive
Host: Leo
Guest: Ava
Leo: Welcome back to Frame & Light.
Today we're talking about underwater photography, and I'm joined by Ava, underwater photographer.
Excited for this one — underwater imaging is something I've been thinking about a lot.
